name: Panamera Holdings Corp
business: Panamera Holdings Corporation is seeking business opportunities in environmental services and innovative technologies. It entered into an agreement to provide carbon capture capabilities to coal and energy plants. The company currently generates revenue from scrap metal sales.

exposures.sentence: We are currently seeking new business opportunities with established operating business entities to merge with or to acquire with our primary emphasis in the environmental services industry, emerging innovative technologies led by innovation with integration.
On August 1, 2025 we entered into an agreement with Rain Cage Carbon, Inc. to provide carbon capture capabilities to coal and other types of energy plants.
This will enhance abilities to raise equity capital and specializing in metals recycling, domestically sourced critical earth materials from recycling CO , and energy production.
To date, the Company s activities have been limited to its formation and the raising of equity capital and providing consulting services and activities in the scrap metal business.

catalysts.event: Entered into carbon capture agreement with Rain Cage Carbon, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On August 1, 2025 we entered into an agreement with Rain Cage Carbon, Inc. to provide carbon capture capabilities to coal and other types of energy plants.
